home.title: Lucas Mujica — I build websites that move.
home.description: Senior Webflow & front-end developer, 5+ years deep — high-performing, component-driven Webflow sites your marketing team can own, scale and maintain.
home.ogAlt: Lucas Mujica — senior Webflow & front-end developer

work.title: Work — Case studies & projects · Lucas Mujica
work.description: Selected Webflow & front-end builds — case studies and projects by Lucas Mujica.

Hero.sub: Senior Webflow & front-end developer, 5+ years deep. I build high-performing, component-driven sites your marketing team can own, scale and keep editing long after launch.

Work.heading: Builds I'm *proud* to put my name on.
Work.lede: Each one is built to be owned — a component system the client's marketing team can run, scale and keep editing without a developer on call.
Work.allLede: Every build in one place — deep-dive case studies plus the rest of the shelf.

About.heading: A senior Webflow developer who *ships*.
About.lede: Five-plus years and 100+ projects of production-grade Webflow — component-first builds with CMS architecture that marketing teams and small businesses actually enjoy running. Client-First certified, GSAP for the motion, and React / Next.js when a build calls for it. Fast on day one, still easy to edit a year later.

Stack.headingPre: The right tool for the job —
Stack.lede: Everything here is chosen for speed, maintainability, and shipping fast without cutting corners.

Process.heading: How I *work*.
Process.lede: No mystery, no bloated decks — just the three phases behind every site I ship.

steps.title: Strategy before pixels
steps.body: We nail the goal and what “done” means before I open the canvas. Skip this and you're just decorating guesses.

steps.title: Built to scale, not to impress
steps.body: Component-first, performance-first. Real motion where it earns its place — zero bloat, scalable from day one.

steps.title: Launch, then earn it
steps.body: Shipping is the start, not the finish. I tune against real data until the numbers move — opinions don't get a vote.

Testimonials.heading: Don't take my *word* for it.
Testimonials.lede: Proven results, from the people who shipped alongside me.

Contact.heading: Ready to *build*.
Contact.lead: A few quick details so I can scope it before we even talk — or just email me directly.
Contact.successBody: I'll get back to you with next steps within a day.
Contact.errorBody: Something went wrong on my end — email me directly and I'll jump on it.

NotFound.heading: This page took a detour.
NotFound.body: The link's broken or the page moved. Let's get you back to the work.
